sources.title: Samsung Retains No. 1 Position in Global Gaming Monitor Market for Seventh Year
sources.excerpt: Samsung Electronics today announced it has retained its position as the world’s No. 1 gaming monitor brand for the seventh consecutive year, continuing a run that started in 2019. According to the latest data from International Data Corporation (IDC), Samsung captured 18.9% of the global gaming monitor market by revenue,1 reinforcing its leadership in high-performance gaming displays.
